001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.lang.reflect.*;
025import java.text.*;
026import java.time.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.logging.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.conversion.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
040
041/**
042 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link MarshallingContext}.
043 *
044 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
045 *    <li class='info'>Typically session objects are not thread safe nor reusable.  However, bean sessions do not maintain any state and
046 *       thus can be safely cached and reused.
047 * </ul>
048 *
049 */
050@SuppressWarnings({
051   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
052   "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
053   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
054   "java:S1452"  // Wildcard required - ClassMeta<?>, ObjectSwap<?,?>, etc. for bean metadata
055})
056public class MarshallingSession extends ContextSession implements ConverterSession, BeanSession {
057
058   // Property name constants
059   private static final String PROP_locale = "locale";
060   private static final String PROP_mediaType = "mediaType";
061   private static final String PROP_timeZone = "timeZone";
062   private static final String PROP_activeView = "activeView";
063   private static final String PROP_BeanSession_locale = "MarshallingSession.locale";
064   private static final String PROP_BeanSession_mediaType = "MarshallingSession.mediaType";
065   private static final String PROP_BeanSession_timeZone = "MarshallingSession.timeZone";
066   private static final String PROP_BeanSession_activeView = "MarshallingSession.activeView";
067
068   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
069   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
070   private static final String ARG_o = "o";
071   private static final String ARG_c = "c";
072   private static final String ARG_classes = "classes";
073
074   /**
075    * Builder class.
076    */
077   @SuppressWarnings({
078      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
079   })
080   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends ContextSession.Builder<SELF> {
081
082      private MarshallingContext ctx;
083      private Locale locale;
084      private MediaType mediaType;
085      private TimeZone timeZone;
086      private String activeView;
087
088      /**
089       * Constructor
090       *
091       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
092       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
093       */
094      protected Builder(MarshallingContext ctx) {
095         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
096         this.ctx = ctx;
097         mediaType = ctx.getMediaType();
098         timeZone = ctx.getTimeZone();
099         activeView = ctx.getActiveView();
100      }
101
102      /**
103       * Build the object.
104       *
105       * @return The built object.
106       */
107      @Override
108      public MarshallingSession build() {
109         return new MarshallingSession(this);
110      }
111
112      /**
113       * The session locale.
114       *
115       * <p>
116       * Specifies the default locale for serializer and parser sessions.
117       *
118       * <p>
119       * If not specified, defaults to {@link MarshallingContext.Builder#locale(Locale)}.
120       *
121       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
122       *    <li class='ja'>{@link MarshalledConfig#locale()}
123       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#locale(Locale)}
124       * </ul>
125       *
126       * @param value
127       *    The new value for this property.
128       *    <br>If <jk>null</jk> defaults to {@link MarshallingContext#getLocale()}
129       * @return This object.
130       */
131      public SELF locale(Locale value) {
132         locale = value;
133         return self();
134      }
135
136      /**
137       * The session media type.
138       *
139       * <p>
140       * Specifies the default media type value for serializer and parser sessions.
141       *
142       * <p>
143       * If not specified, defaults to {@link MarshallingContext.Builder#mediaType(MediaType)}.
144       *
145       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
146       *    <li class='ja'>{@link MarshalledConfig#mediaType()}
147       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#mediaType(MediaType)}
148       * </ul>
149       *
150       * @param value
151       *    The new value for this property.
152       *    <br>If <jk>null</jk> defaults to {@link MarshallingContext#getMediaType()}.
153       * @return This object.
154       */
155      public SELF mediaType(MediaType value) {
156         mediaType = value;
157         return self();
158      }
159
160      /**
161       * Same as {@link #mediaType(MediaType)} but doesn't overwrite the value if it is already set.
162       *
163       * @param value
164       *    The new value for this property.
165       *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, then the locale defined on the context is used.
166       * @return This object.
167       */
168      public SELF mediaTypeDefault(MediaType value) {
169         if (mediaType == null)
170            mediaType = value;
171         return self();
172      }
173
174      /**
175       * Overrides the active view for this session.
176       *
177       * <p>
178       * When set, only bean properties whose declared {@link MarshalledProp#view()} set contains this view name
179       * will be included during serialization.  On the parse side, out-of-view properties are routed through
180       * the existing unknown/ignored-property mechanism.
181       *
182       * <p>
183       * This is a per-call override.  If not set, the value from
184       * {@link MarshallingContext.Builder#activeView(String)} is used.
185       *
186       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
187       *    <li class='ja'>{@link MarshalledProp#view()}
188       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#activeView(String)}
189       * </ul>
190       *
191       * @param value The active view name.  Use <jk>null</jk> to disable view filtering for this call.
192       * @return This object.
193       * @since 10.0.0
194       */
195      public SELF activeView(String value) {
196         activeView = value;
197         return self();
198      }
199
200      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
201      public SELF property(String key, Object value) {
202         if (key == null) {
203            super.property(key, value);  // delegates null-key validation to base class
204            return self();
205         }
206         switch (key) {
207            case PROP_locale, PROP_BeanSession_locale:
208               return locale(cvt(value, Locale.class));
209            case PROP_mediaType, PROP_BeanSession_mediaType:
210               return mediaType(cvt(value, MediaType.class));
211            case PROP_timeZone, PROP_BeanSession_timeZone:
212               return timeZone(cvt(value, TimeZone.class));
213            case PROP_activeView, PROP_BeanSession_activeView:
214               return activeView(cvt(value, String.class));
215            default:
216               super.property(key, value);
217               return self();
218         }
219      }
220
221      /**
222       * The session timezone.
223       *
224       * <p>
225       * Specifies the default timezone for serializer and parser sessions.
226       *
227       * <p>
228       * If not specified, defaults to {@link MarshallingContext.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)}.
229       *
230       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
231       *    <li class='ja'>{@link MarshalledConfig#timeZone()}
232       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)}
233       * </ul>
234       *
235       * @param value
236       *    The new value for this property.
237       *    <br>If <jk>null</jk> defaults to {@link MarshallingContext#getTimeZone()}.
238       * @return This object.
239       */
240      public SELF timeZone(TimeZone value) {
241         timeZone = value;
242         return self();
243      }
244
245      /**
246       * Same as {@link #timeZone(TimeZone)} but doesn't overwrite the value if it is already set.
247       *
248       * @param value
249       *    The new value for this property.
250       *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, then the locale defined on the context is used.
251       * @return This object.
252       */
253      public SELF timeZoneDefault(TimeZone value) {
254         if (timeZone == null)
255            timeZone = value;
256         return self();
257      }
258
259   }
260
261   /**
262    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
263    */
264   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
265
266      DefaultBuilder(MarshallingContext ctx) {
267         super(ctx);
268      }
269   }
270
271   private static final Logger LOG = Logger.getLogger(cn(MarshallingSession.class));
272
273   /**
274    * Creates a builder of this object.
275    *
276    * @param ctx The context creating this builder.
277    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
278    * @return A new builder.
279    */
280   public static Builder<?> create(MarshallingContext ctx) {
281      return new DefaultBuilder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
282   }
283
284   /**
285    * The name property name.
286    *
287    * <p>
288    * Currently this always returns <js>"_name"</js>.
289    */
290   public static final String NAME_PROPERTY_NAME = "_name";
291
292   private final MarshallingContext ctx;
293   private final Locale locale;
294   private final MediaType mediaType;
295   private final TimeZone timeZone;
296   private final String activeView;
297
298   /**
299    * Constructor.
300    *
301    * @param builder The builder for this object.
302    */
303   protected MarshallingSession(Builder<?> builder) {
304      super(builder);
305      ctx = builder.ctx;
306      locale = o(builder.locale).orElse(ctx.getLocale());
307      mediaType = o(builder.mediaType).orElse(builder.mediaType);
308      timeZone = o(builder.timeZone).orElse(builder.timeZone);
309      activeView = builder.activeView;
310   }
311
312   @Override /* ConverterSession */
313   public <T> Optional<T> get(Class<T> c) {
314      if (c == TimeZone.class) return o(c.cast(timeZone));
315      if (c == Locale.class) return o(c.cast(locale));
316      if (c == MediaType.class) return o(c.cast(mediaType));
317      return oe();
318   }
319
320   /**
321    * Logs a warning message.
322    *
323    * @param msg The warning message.
324    * @param args Optional {@link MessageFormat}-style arguments.
325    */
326   @Override
327   public void addWarning(String msg, Object...args) {
328      if (isDebug())
329         LOG.log(Level.WARNING, () -> args.length == 0 ? msg : f(msg, args));
330      super.addWarning(msg, args);
331   }
332
333   /**
334    * Same as {@link #convertToType(Object, Class)}, except used for instantiating inner member classes that must
335    * be instantiated within another class instance.
336    *
337    * @param <T> The class type to convert the value to.
338    * @param outer
339    *    If class is a member class, this is the instance of the containing class.
340    *    Should be <jk>null</jk> if not a member class.
341    * @param value The value to convert.
342    * @param type The class type to convert the value to.
343    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If the specified value cannot be converted to the specified type.
344    * @return The converted value.
345    */
346   public final <T> T convertToMemberType(Object outer, Object value, Class<T> type) throws InvalidDataConversionException {
347      return convertToMemberType(outer, value, getClassMeta(type));
348   }
349
350   /**
351    * Converts the specified value to the specified class type.
352    *
353    * <p>
354    * See {@link #convertToType(Object, ClassMeta)} for the list of valid conversions.
355    *
356    * @param <T> The class type to convert the value to.
357    * @param value The value to convert.
358    * @param type The class type to convert the value to.
359    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If the specified value cannot be converted to the specified type.
360    * @return The converted value.
361    */
362   public final <T> T convertToType(Object value, Class<T> type) throws InvalidDataConversionException {
363      // Shortcut for most common case.
364      if (nn(value) && value.getClass() == type)
365         return (T)value;
366      return convertToMemberType(null, value, getClassMeta(type));
367   }
368
369   /**
370    * Casts the specified value into the specified type.
371    *
372    * <p>
373    * If the value isn't an instance of the specified type, then converts the value if possible.
374    *
375    * <p>
376    * The following conversions are valid:
377    * <table class='styled'>
378    *    <tr><th>Convert to type</th><th>Valid input value types</th><th>Notes</th></tr>
379    *    <tr>
380    *       <td>
381    *          A class that is the normal type of a registered {@link ObjectSwap}.
382    *       </td>
383    *       <td>
384    *          A value whose class matches the transformed type of that registered {@link ObjectSwap}.
385    *       </td>
386    *       <td>&nbsp;</td>
387    *    </tr>
388    *    <tr>
389    *       <td>
390    *          A class that is the transformed type of a registered {@link ObjectSwap}.
391    *       </td>
392    *       <td>
393    *          A value whose class matches the normal type of that registered {@link ObjectSwap}.
394    *       </td>
395    *       <td>&nbsp;</td>
396    *    </tr>
397    *    <tr>
398    *       <td>
399    *          {@code Number} (e.g. {@code Integer}, {@code Short}, {@code Float},...)
400    *          <br><code>Number.<jsf>TYPE</jsf></code> (e.g. <code>Integer.<jsf>TYPE</jsf></code>,
401    *          <code>Short.<jsf>TYPE</jsf></code>, <code>Float.<jsf>TYPE</jsf></code>,...)
402    *       </td>
403    *       <td>
404    *          {@code Number}, {@code String}, <jk>null</jk>
405    *       </td>
406    *       <td>
407    *          For primitive {@code TYPES}, <jk>null</jk> returns the JVM default value for that type.
408    *       </td>
409    *    </tr>
410    *    <tr>
411    *       <td>
412    *          {@code Map} (e.g. {@code Map}, {@code HashMap}, {@code TreeMap}, {@code JsonMap})
413    *       </td>
414    *       <td>
415    *          {@code Map}
416    *       </td>
417    *       <td>
418    *          If {@code Map} is not constructible, an {@code JsonMap} is created.
419    *       </td>
420    *    </tr>
421    *    <tr>
422    *       <td>
423    *       {@code Collection} (e.g. {@code List}, {@code LinkedList}, {@code HashSet}, {@code JsonList})
424    *       </td>
425    *       <td>
426    *          {@code Collection<Object>}
427    *          <br>{@code Object[]}
428    *       </td>
429    *       <td>
430    *          If {@code Collection} is not constructible, an {@code JsonList} is created.
431    *       </td>
432    *    </tr>
433    *    <tr>
434    *       <td>
435    *          {@code X[]} (array of any type X)
436    *       </td>
437    *       <td>
438    *          {@code List<X>}
439    *       </td>
440    *       <td>&nbsp;</td>
441    *    </tr>
442    *    <tr>
443    *       <td>
444    *          {@code X[][]} (multi-dimensional arrays)
445    *       </td>
446    *       <td>
447    *          {@code List<List<X>>}
448    *          <br>{@code List<X[]>}
449    *          <br>{@code List[]<X>}
450    *       </td>
451    *       <td>&nbsp;</td>
452    *    </tr>
453    *    <tr>
454    *       <td>
455    *          {@code Enum}
456    *       </td>
457    *       <td>
458    *          {@code String}
459    *       </td>
460    *       <td>&nbsp;</td>
461    *    </tr>
462    *    <tr>
463    *       <td>
464    *          Bean
465    *       </td>
466    *       <td>
467    *          {@code Map}
468    *       </td>
469    *       <td>&nbsp;</td>
470    *    </tr>
471    *    <tr>
472    *       <td>
473    *          {@code String}
474    *       </td>
475    *       <td>
476    *          Anything
477    *       </td>
478    *       <td>
479    *          Arrays are converted to JSON arrays
480    *       </td>
481    *    </tr>
482    *    <tr>
483    *       <td>
484    *          Anything with one of the following methods:
485    *          <br><code><jk>public static</jk> T fromString(String)</code>
486    *          <br><code><jk>public static</jk> T valueOf(String)</code>
487    *          <br><code><jk>public</jk> T(String)</code>
488    *       </td>
489    *       <td>
490    *          <c>String</c>
491    *       </td>
492    *       <td>
493    *          <br>
494    *       </td>
495    *    </tr>
496    * </table>
497    *
498    * @param <T> The class type to convert the value to.
499    * @param value The value to be converted.
500    * @param type The target object type.
501    * @return The converted type.
502    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If the specified value cannot be converted to the specified type.
503    */
504   public final <T> T convertToType(Object value, ClassMeta<T> type) throws InvalidDataConversionException {
505      return convertToMemberType(null, value, type);
506   }
507
508   /**
509    * Same as {@link #convertToType(Object, Class)}, but allows for complex data types consisting of collections or maps.
510    *
511    * @param <T> The class type to convert the value to.
512    * @param value The value to be converted.
513    * @param type The target object type.
514    * @param args The target object parameter types.
515    * @return The converted type.
516    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If the specified value cannot be converted to the specified type.
517    */
518   public final <T> T convertToType(Object value, Type type, Type...args) throws InvalidDataConversionException {
519      return (T)convertToMemberType(null, value, getClassMeta(type, args));
520   }
521
522   /**
523    * Returns the annotation provider for this session.
524    *
525    * @return The annotation provider for this session.
526    */
527   public AnnotationProvider getAnnotationProvider() {
528      return ctx.getAnnotationProvider();
529   }
530
531   /**
532    * Returns the {@link MarshallingContext} backing this session.
533    *
534    * @return The marshalling context.
535    */
536   public final MarshallingContext getMarshallingContext() {
537      return ctx;
538   }
539
540   /**
541    * Minimum bean class visibility.
542    *
543    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanClassVisibility(Visibility)
544    * @return
545    *    Classes are not considered beans unless they meet the minimum visibility requirements.
546    */
547   public final Visibility getBeanClassVisibility() { return ctx.getBeanClassVisibility(); }
548
549   /**
550    * Minimum bean constructor visibility.
551    *
552    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanConstructorVisibility(Visibility)
553    * @return
554    *    Only look for constructors with this specified minimum visibility.
555    */
556   public final Visibility getBeanConstructorVisibility() { return ctx.getBeanConstructorVisibility(); }
557
558   /**
559    * Bean dictionary.
560    *
561    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanDictionary(ClassInfo...)
562    * @return
563    *    The list of classes that make up the bean dictionary in this bean context.
564    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
565    *    <br>List is unmodifiable.
566    */
567   public final List<ClassInfo> getBeanDictionary() { return ctx.getBeanDictionary(); }
568
569   /**
570    * Minimum bean field visibility.
571    *
572    *
573    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanFieldVisibility(Visibility)
574    * @return
575    *    Only look for bean fields with this specified minimum visibility.
576    */
577   public final Visibility getBeanFieldVisibility() { return ctx.getBeanFieldVisibility(); }
578
579   /**
580    * Returns the {@link BeanMeta} class for the specified class.
581    *
582    * @param <T> The class type to get the meta-data on.
583    * @param c The class to get the meta-data on.
584    * @return
585    *    The {@link BeanMeta} for the specified class, or <jk>null</jk> if the class
586    *    is not a bean per the settings on this context.
587    */
588   public final <T> BeanMeta<T> getBeanMeta(Class<T> c) {
589      if (c == null)
590         return null;
591      return getClassMeta(c).getBeanMeta();
592   }
593
594   /**
595    * Minimum bean method visibility.
596    *
597    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanMethodVisibility(Visibility)
598    * @return
599    *    Only look for bean methods with this specified minimum visibility.
600    */
601   public final Visibility getBeanMethodVisibility() { return ctx.getBeanMethodVisibility(); }
602
603   /**
604    * Returns the bean registry defined in this bean context defined by {@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanDictionary(ClassInfo...)}.
605    *
606    * @return The bean registry defined in this bean context.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
607    */
608   public final BeanRegistry getBeanRegistry() { return ctx.getBeanRegistry(); }
609
610   /**
611    * Bean type property name.
612    *
613    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#typePropertyName(String)
614    * @return
615    *    The name of the bean property used to store the dictionary name of a bean type so that the parser knows the data type to reconstruct.
616    */
617   public final String getBeanTypePropertyName() { return ctx.getBeanTypePropertyName(); }
618
619   /**
620    * Returns the type property name as defined by {@link MarshallingContext.Builder#typePropertyName(String)}.
621    *
622    * @param cm
623    *    The class meta of the type we're trying to resolve the type name for.
624    *    Can be <jk>null</jk>.
625    * @return The type property name.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
626    */
627   public final String getBeanTypePropertyName(ClassMeta cm) {
628      if (cm == null)
629         return getBeanTypePropertyName();
630      var beanMeta = cm.getBeanMeta();
631      if (beanMeta == null)
632         return getBeanTypePropertyName();
633      var s = beanMeta.getTypePropertyName();
634      return s == null ? getBeanTypePropertyName() : s;
635   }
636
637   /**
638    * Returns a {@code ClassMeta} wrapper around a {@link Class} object.
639    *
640    * @param <T> The class type being wrapped.
641    * @param c The class being wrapped.
642    * @return The class meta object containing information about the class.
643    */
644   public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMeta(Class<T> c) {
645      return ctx.getClassMeta(c);
646   }
647
648   /**
649    * Used to resolve <c>ClassMetas</c> of type <c>Collection</c> and <c>Map</c> that have
650    * <c>ClassMeta</c> values that themselves could be collections or maps.
651    *
652    * <p>
653    * <c>Collection</c> meta objects are assumed to be followed by zero or one meta objects indicating the
654    * element type.
655    *
656    * <p>
657    * <c>Map</c> meta objects are assumed to be followed by zero or two meta objects indicating the key and value
658    * types.
659    *
660    * <p>
661    * The array can be arbitrarily long to indicate arbitrarily complex data structures.
662    *
663    * <h5 class='section'>Examples:</h5>
664    * <ul>
665    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A normal type.
666    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(List.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A list containing objects.
667    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(List.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A list containing strings.
668    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A linked-list containing
669    *       strings.
670    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> -
671    *       A linked-list containing linked-lists of strings.
672    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(Map.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A map containing object keys/values.
673    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(Map.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A map
674    *       containing string keys/values.
675    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(Map.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>, List.<jk>class</jk>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);</code> -
676    *       A map containing string keys and values of lists containing beans.
677    * </ul>
678    *
679    * @param <T>
680    *    The class to resolve.
681    * @param type
682    *    The class to resolve.
683    *    <br>Can be any of the following: {@link ClassMeta}, {@link Class}, {@link ParameterizedType}, {@link GenericArrayType}
684    * @param args
685    *    The type arguments of the class if it's a collection or map.
686    *    <br>Can be any of the following: {@link ClassMeta}, {@link Class}, {@link ParameterizedType}, {@link GenericArrayType}
687    *    <br>Ignored if the main type is not a map or collection.
688    * @return The class meta.
689    */
690   public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMeta(Type type, Type...args) {
691      return ctx.getClassMeta(type, args);
692   }
693
694   /**
695    * Shortcut for calling {@code getClassMeta(o.getClass())}.
696    *
697    * @param <T> The class of the object being passed in.
698    * @param o The class to find the class type for.
699    * @return The ClassMeta object, or <jk>null</jk> if {@code o} is <jk>null</jk>.
700    */
701   public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMetaForObject(T o) {
702      return (ClassMeta<T>)getClassMetaForObject(o, null);
703   }
704
705   /**
706    * Locale.
707    *
708    * <p>
709    * The locale is determined in the following order:
710    * <ol>
711    *    <li><c>locale</c> parameter passed in through constructor.
712    *    <li>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#locale(Locale)} setting on bean context.
713    *    <li>Locale returned by {@link Locale#getDefault()}.
714    * </ol>
715    *
716    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#locale(Locale)
717    * @return The session locale.
718    */
719   public Locale getLocale() { return locale; }
720
721   /**
722    * Active view.
723    *
724    * <p>
725    * Returns the active view name for this session.  When non-<jk>null</jk>, only bean properties whose
726    * declared {@link MarshalledProp#view()} set contains this name are included during serialization, and
727    * out-of-view properties encountered during parsing are treated as unknown.
728    *
729    * <p>
730    * This is the per-call override value, which defaults to {@link MarshallingContext#getActiveView()}.
731    *
732    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#activeView(String)
733    * @see MarshallingSession.Builder#activeView(String)
734    * @return The active view for this session, or <jk>null</jk> if view filtering is not active.
735    * @since 10.0.0
736    */
737   public final String getActiveView() { return activeView; }
738
739   @Override /* BeanSession */
740   public boolean isPropertyInActiveView(BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) {
741      if (activeView == null)
742         return true;
743      var views = pMeta.getViews();
744      if (ie(views))
745         return ctx.isDefaultViewInclusion();
746      return views.contains(activeView);
747   }
748
749   /**
750    * Media type.
751    *
752    * <p>
753    * For example, <js>"application/json"</js>.
754    *
755    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#mediaType(MediaType)
756    * @return The media type for this session, or <jk>null</jk> if not specified.
757    */
758   public final MediaType getMediaType() { return mediaType; }
759
760   /**
761    * Bean class exclusions.
762    *
763    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#notBeanClasses(ClassInfo...)
764    * @return
765    *    The list of classes that are explicitly not beans.
766    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
767    *    <br>List is unmodifiable.
768    */
769   public final List<ClassInfo> getNotBeanClasses() { return ctx.getNotBeanClasses(); }
770
771   /**
772    * Bean package exclusions.
773    *
774    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#notBeanPackages(String...)
775    * @return
776    *    The set of fully-qualified package names to exclude from being classified as beans.
777    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
778    *    <br>Set is unmodifiable.
779    */
780   public final Set<String> getNotBeanPackagesNames() { return ctx.getNotBeanPackagesNames(); }
781
782   /**
783    * Bean property namer.
784    *
785    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#propertyNamer(Class)
786    * @return
787    *    The interface used to calculate bean property names.
788    */
789   public final PropertyNamer getPropertyNamer() { return ctx.getPropertyNamer(); }
790
791   /**
792    * Session classloader.
793    *
794    * <p>
795    * Returns the classloader explicitly configured via {@link MarshallingContext.Builder#classLoader(ClassLoader)},
796    * or <jk>null</jk> if none was set (callers should fall back to the thread-context classloader).
797    *
798    * @return The session classloader, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
799    */
800   public final ClassLoader getClassLoader() { return ctx.getClassLoader(); }
801
802   /**
803    * Java object swaps.
804    *
805    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#swaps(Class...)
806    * @return
807    *    The list POJO swaps defined.
808    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
809    *    <br>List is unmodifiable.
810    */
811   public final List<ObjectSwap<?,?>> getSwaps() { return ctx.getSwaps(); }
812
813   /**
814    * Time zone.
815    *
816    * <p>
817    * The timezone is determined in the following order:
818    * <ol>
819    *    <li><c>timeZone</c> parameter passed in through constructor.
820    *    <li>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)} setting on bean context.
821    * </ol>
822    *
823    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)
824    * @return The session timezone, or <jk>null</jk> if timezone not specified.
825    */
826   public final TimeZone getTimeZone() { return timeZone; }
827
828   /**
829    * Time zone.
830    *
831    * <p>
832    * The timezone is determined in the following order:
833    * <ol>
834    *    <li><c>timeZone</c> parameter passed in through constructor.
835    *    <li>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)} setting on bean context.
836    * </ol>
837    *
838    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)
839    * @return The session timezone, or the system timezone if not specified.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
840    */
841   public final ZoneId getTimeZoneId() { return timeZone == null ? ZoneId.systemDefault() : timeZone.toZoneId(); }
842
843   /**
844    * Determines whether the specified class matches the requirements on this context of being a bean.
845    *
846    * @param c The class being tested.
847    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified class is considered a bean.
848    */
849   public final boolean isBean(Class<?> c) {
850      return nn(getBeanMeta(c));
851   }
852
853   /**
854    * Determines whether the specified object matches the requirements on this context of being a bean.
855    *
856    * @param o The object being tested.
857    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified object is considered a bean.
858    */
859   public final boolean isBean(Object o) {
860      if (o == null)
861         return false;
862      return isBean(o.getClass());
863   }
864
865   /**
866    * BeanMap.put() returns old property value.
867    *
868    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanMapPutReturnsOldValue()
869    * @return
870    *    <jk>true</jk> if the {@link BeanMap#put(String,Object) BeanMap.put()} method will return old property values.
871    *    <br>Otherwise, it returns <jk>null</jk>.
872    */
873   public final boolean isBeanMapPutReturnsOldValue() { return ctx.isBeanMapPutReturnsOldValue(); }
874
875   /**
876    * Beans require no-arg constructors.
877    *
878    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beansRequireDefaultConstructor()
879    * @return
880    *    <jk>true</jk> if a Java class must implement a default no-arg constructor to be considered a bean.
881    *    <br>Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
882    */
883   public final boolean isBeansRequireDefaultConstructor() { return ctx.isBeansRequireDefaultConstructor(); }
884
885   /**
886    * Beans require Serializable interface.
887    *
888    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beansRequireSerializable()
889    * @return
890    *    <jk>true</jk> if a Java class must implement the {@link Serializable} interface to be considered a bean.
891    *    <br>Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
892    */
893   public final boolean isBeansRequireSerializable() { return ctx.isBeansRequireSerializable(); }
894
895   /**
896    * Beans require setters for getters.
897    *
898    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beansRequireSettersForGetters()
899    * @return
900    *    <jk>true</jk> if only getters that have equivalent setters will be considered as properties on a bean.
901    *    <br>Otherwise, they are ignored.
902    */
903   public final boolean isBeansRequireSettersForGetters() { return ctx.isBeansRequireSettersForGetters(); }
904
905   /**
906    * Beans require at least one property.
907    *
908    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableBeansRequireSomeProperties()
909    * @return
910    *    <jk>true</jk> if a Java class doesn't need to contain at least 1 property to be considered a bean.
911    *    <br>Otherwise, the bean is serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
912    */
913   public final boolean isBeansRequireSomeProperties() { return ctx.isBeansRequireSomeProperties(); }
914
915   /**
916    * Find fluent setters.
917    *
918    * <h5 class='section'>Description:</h5>
919    * <p>
920    *
921    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#findFluentSetters()
922    * @return
923    *    <jk>true</jk> if fluent setters are detected on beans.
924    */
925   public final boolean isFindFluentSetters() { return ctx.isFindFluentSetters(); }
926
927   /**
928    * Ignore invocation errors on getters.
929    *
930    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters()
931    * @return
932    *    <jk>true</jk> if errors thrown when calling bean getter methods are silently ignored.
933    */
934   public final boolean isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters() { return ctx.isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters(); }
935
936   /**
937    * Ignore invocation errors on setters.
938    *
939    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters()
940    * @return
941    *    <jk>true</jk> if errors thrown when calling bean setter methods are silently ignored.
942    */
943   public final boolean isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters() { return ctx.isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters(); }
944
945   /**
946    * Silently ignore missing setters.
947    *
948    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableIgnoreMissingSetters()
949    * @return
950    *    <jk>true</jk> if trying to set a value on a bean property without a setter should throw a {@link BeanRuntimeException}.
951    */
952   public final boolean isIgnoreMissingSetters() { return ctx.isIgnoreMissingSetters(); }
953
954   /**
955    * Ignore unknown properties.
956    *
957    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#ignoreUnknownBeanProperties()
958    * @return
959    *    <jk>true</jk> if trying to set a value on a non-existent bean property is silently ignored.
960    *    <br>Otherwise, a {@code RuntimeException} is thrown.
961    */
962   public final boolean isIgnoreUnknownBeanProperties() { return ctx.isIgnoreUnknownBeanProperties(); }
963
964   /**
965    * Schema validation mode.
966    *
967    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#validateSchema()
968    * @return
969    *    <jk>true</jk> if bean property values should be validated against their {@code @Schema}-declared constraints
970    *    during parsing and serialization.
971    * @since 10.0.0
972    */
973   public final boolean isValidateSchema() { return ctx.isValidateSchema(); }
974
975   /**
976    * Ignore unknown properties with null values.
977    *
978    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties()
979    * @return
980    *    <jk>true</jk> if trying to set a <jk>null</jk> value on a non-existent bean property should not throw a {@link BeanRuntimeException}.
981    */
982   public final boolean isIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties() { return ctx.isIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties(); }
983
984   /**
985    * Unsorted properties.
986    *
987    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#unsortedProperties()
988    * @return
989    *    <jk>true</jk> if bean properties are serialized in natural JVM-dependent order instead of alphabetically.
990    */
991   public final boolean isUnsortedProperties() { return ctx.isUnsortedProperties(); }
992
993   /**
994    * Use interface proxies.
995    *
996    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableInterfaceProxies()
997    * @return
998    *    <jk>true</jk> if interfaces will be instantiated as proxy classes through the use of an
999    *    {@link InvocationHandler} if there is no other way of instantiating them.
1000    */
1001   public final boolean isUseInterfaceProxies() { return ctx.isUseInterfaceProxies(); }
1002
1003   /**
1004    * Use Java Introspector.
1005    *
1006    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#useJavaBeanIntrospector()
1007    * @return
1008    *    <jk>true</jk> if the built-in Java bean introspector should be used for bean introspection.
1009    */
1010   public final boolean isUseJavaBeanIntrospector() { return ctx.isUseJavaBeanIntrospector(); }
1011
1012   /**
1013    * Creates a new empty bean of the specified type, except used for instantiating inner member classes that must
1014    * be instantiated within another class instance.
1015    *
1016    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
1017    * <p class='bjava'>
1018    *    <jc>// Construct a new instance of the specified bean class</jc>
1019    *    Person <jv>person</jv> = MarshallingContext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.newBean(Person.<jk>class</jk>);
1020    * </p>
1021    *
1022    * @param <T> The class type of the bean being created.
1023    * @param c The class type of the bean being created.
1024    * @return A new bean object.
1025    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If the specified class is not a valid bean.
1026    */
1027   public final <T> T newBean(Class<T> c) throws BeanRuntimeException {
1028      return newBean(null, c);
1029   }
1030
1031   /**
1032    * Same as {@link #newBean(Class)}, except used for instantiating inner member classes that must be instantiated
1033    * within another class instance.
1034    *
1035    * @param <T> The class type of the bean being created.
1036    * @param c The class type of the bean being created.
1037    * @param outer
1038    *    If class is a member class, this is the instance of the containing class.
1039    *    Should be <jk>null</jk> if not a member class.
1040    * @return A new bean object.
1041    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If the specified class is not a valid bean.
1042    */
1043   public final <T> T newBean(Object outer, Class<T> c) throws BeanRuntimeException {
1044      var cm = getClassMeta(c);
1045      var m = cm.getBeanMeta();
1046      if (m == null)
1047         return null;
1048      try {
1049         var o = m.newBean(outer);
1050         if (o == null)
1051            throw brex(c, "Class does not have a no-arg constructor.");
1052         return o;
1053      } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
1054         throw e;
1055      } catch (Exception e) {
1056         throw brex(e);
1057      }
1058   }
1059
1060   /**
1061    * Creates a new {@link BeanMap} object (a modifiable {@link Map}) of the given class with uninitialized
1062    * property values.
1063    *
1064    * <p>
1065    * If object is not a true bean, then throws a {@link BeanRuntimeException} with an explanation of why it's not a
1066    * bean.
1067    *
1068    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
1069    * <p class='bjava'>
1070    *    <jc>// Construct a new bean map wrapped around a new Person object</jc>
1071    *    BeanMap&lt;Person&gt; <jv>beanMap</jv> = MarshallingContext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.newBeanMap(Person.<jk>class</jk>);
1072    * </p>
1073    *
1074    * @param <T> The class of the object being wrapped.
1075    * @param c The name of the class to create a new instance of.
1076    * @return A new instance of the class.
1077    */
1078   public final <T> BeanMap<T> newBeanMap(Class<T> c) {
1079      return newBeanMap(null, c);
1080   }
1081
1082   /**
1083    * Same as {@link #newBeanMap(Class)}, except used for instantiating inner member classes that must be instantiated
1084    * within another class instance.
1085    *
1086    * @param <T> The class of the object being wrapped.
1087    * @param c The name of the class to create a new instance of.
1088    * @param outer
1089    *    If class is a member class, this is the instance of the containing class.
1090    *    Should be <jk>null</jk> if not a member class.
1091    * @return A new instance of the class.
1092    */
1093   @SuppressWarnings({
1094      "java:S1168",   // null when BeanMeta not found. Consider empty BeanMap.
1095      "java:S1135"    // Deferred design consideration.
1096   })
1097   public final <T> BeanMap<T> newBeanMap(Object outer, Class<T> c) {
1098      var m = getBeanMeta(c);
1099      if (m == null)
1100         return null;
1101      T bean = null;
1102      if (ie(m.getConstructorArgs()))
1103         bean = newBean(outer, c);
1104      var bm = new BeanMap<>(bean, m);
1105      bm.setBeanSession(this);
1106      return bm;
1107   }
1108
1109   /**
1110    * Returns a reusable {@link ClassMeta} representation for the class <c>Object</c>.
1111    *
1112    * <p>
1113    * This <c>ClassMeta</c> is often used to represent "any object type" when an object type is not known.
1114    *
1115    * <p>
1116    * This method is identical to calling <code>getClassMeta(Object.<jk>class</jk>)</code> but uses a cached copy to
1117    * avoid a hashmap lookup.
1118    *
1119    * @return The {@link ClassMeta} object associated with the <c>Object</c> class.
1120    */
1121   public final ClassMeta<Object> object() {
1122      return ctx.object();
1123   }
1124
1125   /**
1126    * Returns a reusable {@link ClassMeta} representation for the class <c>String</c>.
1127    *
1128    * <p>
1129    * This <c>ClassMeta</c> is often used to represent key types in maps.
1130    *
1131    * <p>
1132    * This method is identical to calling <code>getClassMeta(String.<jk>class</jk>)</code> but uses a cached copy to
1133    * avoid a hashmap lookup.
1134    *
1135    * @return The {@link ClassMeta} object associated with the <c>String</c> class.
1136    */
1137   public final ClassMeta<String> string() {
1138      return ctx.string();
1139   }
1140
1141   /**
1142    * Wraps an object inside a {@link BeanMap} object (a modifiable {@link Map}).
1143    *
1144    * <p>
1145    * If object is not a true bean, then throws a {@link BeanRuntimeException} with an explanation of why it's not a
1146    * bean.
1147    *
1148    * <p>
1149    * If object is already a {@link BeanMap}, simply returns the same object.
1150    *
1151    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
1152    * <p class='bjava'>
1153    *    <jc>// Construct a bean map around a bean instance</jc>
1154    *    BeanMap&lt;Person&gt; <jv>beanMap</jv> = MarshallingContext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.toBeanMap(<jk>new</jk> Person());
1155    * </p>
1156    *
1157    * @param <T> The class of the object being wrapped.
1158    * @param o The object to wrap in a map interface.  Must not be null.
1159    * @return The wrapped object.
1160    */
1161   @Override
1162   public final <T> BeanMap<T> toBeanMap(T o) {
1163      if (o instanceof BeanMap o2)
1164         return o2;
1165      return this.toBeanMap(o, (Class<T>)o.getClass());
1166   }
1167
1168   /**
1169    * Wraps an object inside a {@link BeanMap} object (i.e.: a modifiable {@link Map}) defined as a bean for one of its
1170    * class, a super class, or an implemented interface.
1171    *
1172    * <p>
1173    * If object is not a true bean, throws a {@link BeanRuntimeException} with an explanation of why it's not a bean.
1174    *
1175    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
1176    * <p class='bjava'>
1177    *    <jc>// Construct a bean map for new bean using only properties defined in a superclass</jc>
1178    *    BeanMap&lt;MySubBean&gt; <jv>beanMap</jv> = MarshallingContext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.toBeanMap(<jk>new</jk> MySubBean(), MySuperBean.<jk>class</jk>);
1179    *
1180    *    <jc>// Construct a bean map for new bean using only properties defined in an interface</jc>
1181    *    BeanMap&lt;MySubBean&gt; <jv>beanMap</jv> = MarshallingContext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.toBeanMap(<jk>new</jk> MySubBean(), MySuperInterface.<jk>class</jk>);
1182    * </p>
1183    *
1184    * @param <T> The class of the object being wrapped.
1185    * @param o The object to wrap in a bean interface.  Must not be null.
1186    * @param c The superclass to narrow the bean properties to.  Must not be null.
1187    * @return The bean representation, or <jk>null</jk> if the object is not a true bean.
1188    * @throws NullPointerException If either parameter is null.
1189    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the specified object is not an an instance of the specified class.
1190    * @throws
1191    *    BeanRuntimeException If specified object is not a bean according to the bean rules specified in this context
1192    * class.
1193    */
1194   public final <T> BeanMap<T> toBeanMap(T o, Class<? super T> c) throws BeanRuntimeException {
1195      assertArgNotNull(ARG_o, o);
1196      assertArgNotNull(ARG_c, c);
1197      assertArg(c.isInstance(o), "The specified object is not an instance of the specified class.  class=''{0}'', objectClass=''{1}'', object=''{2}''", cn(c), cn(o), 0);
1198
1199      var cm = getClassMeta(c);
1200
1201      BeanMeta m = cm.getBeanMeta();
1202      if (m == null)
1203         throw brex(c, "Class is not a bean.  Reason=''{0}''", cm.getNotABeanReason());
1204      var bm = new BeanMap<>(o, m);
1205      bm.setBeanSession(this);
1206      return bm;
1207   }
1208
1209   /**
1210    * Wraps an object inside a {@link BeanMap} object (a modifiable {@link Map}).
1211    *
1212    * <p>
1213    * Same as {@link #toBeanMap(Object)} but allows you to specify a property namer instance.
1214    *
1215    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
1216    * <p class='bjava'>
1217    *    <jc>// Construct a bean map around a bean instance</jc>
1218    *    BeanMap&lt;Person&gt; <jv>beanMap</jv> = MarshallingContext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.toBeanMap(<jk>new</jk> Person(), PropertyNamerDLC.<jsf>INSTANCE</jsf>);
1219    * </p>
1220    *
1221    * @param <T> The class of the object being wrapped.
1222    * @param o The object to wrap in a map interface.  Must not be null.
1223    * @param propertyNamer The property namer to use.
1224    * @return The wrapped object.
1225    */
1226   @SuppressWarnings({
1227      "java:S1172" // Parameter reserved for future property naming strategy support
1228   })
1229   public final <T> BeanMap<T> toBeanMap(T o, PropertyNamer propertyNamer) {
1230      return this.toBeanMap(o, (Class<T>)o.getClass());
1231   }
1232
1233   /**
1234    * Same as {@link #convertToType(Object, ClassMeta)}, except used for instantiating inner member classes that must
1235    * be instantiated within another class instance.
1236    *
1237    * @param <T> The class type to convert the value to.
1238    * @param outer
1239    *    If class is a member class, this is the instance of the containing class.
1240    *    Should be <jk>null</jk> if not a member class.
1241    * @param value The value to convert.
1242    * @param to The class type to convert the value to.
1243    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If the specified value cannot be converted to the specified type.
1244    * @return The converted value.
1245    */
1246   protected final <T> T convertToMemberType(Object outer, Object value, ClassMeta<T> to) throws InvalidDataConversionException {
1247      if (to == null)
1248         to = (ClassMeta<T>)object();
1249      try {
1250         // If the value is already an instance of the target type and no element/value conversion is needed, return as-is.
1251         // Skip this shortcut for typed maps/collections whose elements may need conversion.
1252         if (value != null && to.inner().isInstance(value)
1253               && !((to.isMap() && !to.getValueType().is(Object.class)) || ((to.isCollection() || to.isOptional()) && !to.getElementType().isObject())))
1254            return (T) value;
1255         return ctx.getConverter().to(value, outer, this, to.innerType(), to.getParameters());
1256      } catch (InvalidDataConversionException e) {
1257         throw e;
1258      } catch (Exception e) {
1259         throw new InvalidDataConversionException(value, to, e);
1260      }
1261   }
1262
1263   /**
1264    * Given an array of {@link Type} objects, returns a {@link ClassMeta} representing those arguments.
1265    *
1266    * <p>
1267    * Constructs a new meta on each call.
1268    *
1269    * @param classes The array of classes to get class metas for.
1270    * @return The args {@link ClassMeta} object corresponding to the classes.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
1271    */
1272   protected final ClassMeta<Object[]> getArgsClassMeta(Type[] classes) {
1273      assertArgNotNull(ARG_classes, classes);
1274      return new ClassMeta(Arrays.stream(classes).map(this::getClassMeta).toList());
1275   }
1276
1277   /**
1278    * Shortcut for calling {@code getClassMeta(o.getClass())} but returns a default value if object is <jk>null</jk>.
1279    *
1280    * @param o The class to find the class type for.
1281    * @param def The default {@link ClassMeta} if the object is null.
1282    * @return The ClassMeta object, or the default value if {@code o} is <jk>null</jk>.
1283    */
1284   protected final ClassMeta<?> getClassMetaForObject(Object o, ClassMeta<?> def) {
1285      if (o == null)
1286         return def;
1287      return getClassMeta(o.getClass());
1288   }
1289
1290   /**
1291    * Creates a generic {@link Map} for parser-driven map population, choosing the map type based on the key type.
1292    *
1293    * <p>
1294    * Returns the flavored {@link MarshalledMap} subclass when the key type is String (via {@link #newGenericMap()}),
1295    * otherwise returns a plain {@link LinkedHashMap} (since {@link MarshalledMap} is keyed by String).
1296    *
1297    * <p>
1298    * Per-marshaller parser sessions override {@link #newGenericMap()} (not this method) to return their flavored
1299    * {@code XMap} variant.
1300    *
1301    * @param mapMeta The metadata of the map to create.
1302    * @return A new map.
1303    */
1304   protected Map newGenericMap(ClassMeta mapMeta) {
1305      var k = mapMeta.getKeyType();
1306      return (k == null || k.isString()) ? newGenericMap() : map();
1307   }
1308
1309   /**
1310    * Creates a string-keyed generic map for parser-driven map population.
1311    *
1312    * <p>
1313    * This is the main factory hook overridden by per-marshaller parser sessions to return their flavored
1314    * {@code XMap} variant (for example, {@link JsonParserSession} returns
1315    * {@link JsonMap}; {@link Json5ParserSession} returns
1316    * {@link Json5Map}).
1317    *
1318    * @return A new map.
1319    */
1320   protected MarshalledMap newGenericMap() {
1321      return new MarshalledMap(this);
1322   }
1323
1324   /**
1325    * Creates a generic list for parser-driven list population.
1326    *
1327    * <p>
1328    * Per-marshaller parser sessions override this hook to return their flavored {@code XList} variant
1329    * (for example, {@link JsonParserSession} returns {@link JsonList};
1330    * {@link Json5ParserSession} returns
1331    * {@link Json5List}).
1332    *
1333    * @return A new list.
1334    */
1335   protected MarshalledList newGenericList() {
1336      return new MarshalledList(this);
1337   }
1338
1339   @Override /* Overridden from ContextSession */
1340   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
1341      return super.properties()
1342         .a(PROP_locale, locale)
1343         .a(PROP_mediaType, mediaType)
1344         .a(PROP_timeZone, timeZone)
1345         .a(PROP_activeView, activeView);
1346   }
1347
1348   /**
1349    * Converts the contents of the specified list into an array.
1350    *
1351    * <p>
1352    * Works on both object and primitive arrays.
1353    *
1354    * <p>
1355    * In the case of multi-dimensional arrays, the incoming list must contain elements of type n-1 dimension.
1356    * i.e. if {@code type} is <code><jk>int</jk>[][]</code> then {@code list} must have entries of type
1357    * <code><jk>int</jk>[]</code>.
1358    *
1359    * @param type The type to convert to.  Must be an array type.
1360    * @param list The contents to populate the array with.
1361    * @return A new object or primitive array.
1362    */
1363   protected final Object toArray(ClassMeta<?> type, Collection<?> list) {
1364      if (list == null)
1365         return null;
1366      var componentType = type.isArgs() ? object() : type.getElementType();
1367      var array = Array.newInstance(componentType.inner(), list.size());
1368      var i = IntegerHolder.create();
1369      list.forEach(x -> {
1370         var x2 = x;
1371         if (! type.isInstance(x)) {
1372            if (componentType.isArray() && x instanceof Collection<?> c)
1373               x2 = toArray(componentType, c);
1374            else if (x == null && componentType.isPrimitive())
1375               x2 = componentType.getPrimitiveDefault();
1376            else
1377               x2 = convertToType(x, componentType);
1378         }
1379         Array.set(array, i.getAndIncrement(), x2);
1380      });
1381      return array;
1382   }
1383
1384   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1385   // BeanSession bridge methods — SPI seam to commons.bean.
1386   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1387
1388   /**
1389    * Bridge implementation of {@link BeanSession#convertToType(Object, Object)} that dispatches to the
1390    * {@link ClassMeta}-typed overload when the supplied {@code targetType} is a {@link ClassMeta}, or to the
1391    * {@link Class}-typed overload when it is a {@link Class}.
1392    *
1393    * <p>
1394    * The bean-modeling layer calls this method through the {@link BeanSession} interface so it can request type
1395    * conversion without referencing the marshalling-side {@link ClassMeta} concrete type.
1396    *
1397    * @param value The value to convert.  May be <jk>null</jk>.
1398    * @param targetType A {@link ClassMeta} or {@link Class} describing the target type.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
1399    * @return The converted value.
1400    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If {@code targetType} is neither a {@link ClassMeta} nor a {@link Class}.
1401    */
1402   @Override /* BeanSession */
1403   public final Object convertToType(Object value, Object targetType) {
1404      if (targetType == null)
1405         return convertToType(value, (ClassMeta<?>) null);
1406      if (targetType instanceof ClassMeta<?> cm)
1407         return convertToType(value, cm);
1408      if (targetType instanceof Class<?> c)
1409         return convertToType(value, c);
1410      throw iaex("Unsupported targetType for convertToType: {0}", cn(targetType));
1411   }
1412
1413   /**
1414    * Bridge implementation of {@link BeanSession#convertToMemberType(Object, Object, Object)} that dispatches to the
1415    * {@link ClassMeta}-typed overload when the supplied {@code targetType} is a {@link ClassMeta}, or to the
1416    * {@link Class}-typed overload when it is a {@link Class}.
1417    *
1418    * @param outer The outer-class instance for non-static inner classes.  May be <jk>null</jk>.
1419    * @param value The value to convert.  May be <jk>null</jk>.
1420    * @param targetType A {@link ClassMeta} or {@link Class} describing the target type.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
1421    * @return The converted value.
1422    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If {@code targetType} is neither a {@link ClassMeta} nor a {@link Class}.
1423    */
1424   @Override /* BeanSession */
1425   public final Object convertToMemberType(Object outer, Object value, Object targetType) {
1426      if (targetType == null)
1427         return convertToMemberType(outer, value, (ClassMeta<?>) null);
1428      if (targetType instanceof ClassMeta<?> cm)
1429         return convertToMemberType(outer, value, cm);
1430      if (targetType instanceof Class<?> c)
1431         return convertToMemberType(outer, value, c);
1432      throw iaex("Unsupported targetType for convertToMemberType: {0}", cn(targetType));
1433   }
1434
1435   /**
1436    * Bridge implementation of {@link BeanSession#parseToMap(CharSequence)} that delegates to
1437    * {@link Json5Map#ofString(CharSequence)} paired with this session.
1438    *
1439    * <p>
1440    * Used by {@link BeanPropertyMeta#setPropertyValue} to parse a {@link CharSequence} into a {@link Map} when
1441    * the property is map-typed.  Lifted out of {@link BeanPropertyMeta} so the bean-modeling layer no longer
1442    * references the marshalling-side JSON parser.
1443    *
1444    * <p>
1445    * Uses {@link Json5Map} so that historic JSON5-form inputs (e.g. annotation default
1446    * values written as <c>{a:'b'}</c>) continue to parse — the strict-JSON {@link JsonMap} retargeting in v10.0
1447    * would otherwise break those call sites.
1448    *
1449    * @param value The JSON-formatted character sequence to parse.
1450    * @return The parsed {@link Json5Map} (empty if {@code value} is <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
1451    */
1452   @Override /* BeanSession */
1453   public final Map<?,?> parseToMap(CharSequence value) {
1454      return Json5Map.ofString(value).session(this);
1455   }
1456
1457   /**
1458    * Bridge implementation of {@link BeanSession#parseToList(CharSequence)} that delegates to
1459    * {@link Json5List#Json5List(CharSequence)} paired with this session.
1460    *
1461    * <p>
1462    * Used by {@link BeanPropertyMeta#setPropertyValue} to parse a {@link CharSequence} into a {@link Collection}
1463    * when the property is collection-typed.  Lifted out of {@link BeanPropertyMeta} so the bean-modeling layer
1464    * no longer references the marshalling-side JSON parser.
1465    *
1466    * <p>
1467    * Uses {@link Json5List} for the same back-compat reasons as
1468    * {@link #parseToMap(CharSequence)}.
1469    *
1470    * @param value The JSON-formatted character sequence to parse.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
1471    * @return The parsed {@link Json5List}.
1472    */
1473   @Override /* BeanSession */
1474   public final Collection<?> parseToList(CharSequence value) {
1475      return new Json5List(value).setBeanSession(this);
1476   }
1477
1478}
